body.u: My Dad is trying to get a job for me. The job is at his work shop werewhere he bend winscreenwindscreens for cars. At school I play cricket and belong to the Sheppey youth wing.
I play table tennis and pool. There are friend who we help we give but I like my friend sister who is a third year.
I have now got a job at my dad work where I help make car winscreenwindscreen I play football with the worker in the spare time I some time take my friend sister to the picture once a week.
I have been working about four years and I am taking part in the football team. I am getting engage to Richard’s sister who has been working for two years in a shop.

I now live in a flat near my work so it is easier to get there. It is to year before I get married but I only play football four or five time a sessonsession. I am twenty two married to Debbie we now live in a house together and we are thinking of raising a family.
Now I am thirty with two child one is two year and the other three.

I still play football I collect coin and stamp and I now bend the winscreenwindscreen for the cars. We play tennis together and still go out at night to a dance where we help people to dance . We sometime go out to the picture but when the summer come we go on holiday in a holiday resort near Margate.

I am forty with two children a wife who work at St John Ambulance and I repair cars as a hobby sometime I take the children to a football match and teach them to play table tennis football basket ball and hockey.

Forty two work at a garage as a mechanic train for football in the team which I play for collect stamp but not coin because there are not very many about to collect. Play tennis in the summer with my wife and children at Margate.

I am forty five and I work at a shop of my own with my wife helping we to serve we have six paper boyboys who diliverdeliver the papperpaper given up football but still play tennis in the sumersummer the children go to school in a secondary school almost in the fourth year I am hoping to keep my children happiehappy to other people we are friend to help them with theretheir Job around the houses sometime we do charity schowshow for the old people we raise little money each year.
I am fifty, children at work my wife and I still go round try to find job for our children if they are now at work.

I am sixty my wife and I live on our own but the children come to see us when they are passing we are help by are children around the house near areour house there is football ground which my children take me to see. We still go out but we stay in mustmost of the time. We live in a smaller houses but are children help us to decorate it.
